title: Noland Enters the Legend
description: The chapter turns into the old history of Shandora, introducing Calgara, the Shandia, and the first hints of Noland’s legend.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this scene focuses on Wyper, Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villager. The chapter turns into the old history of Shandora, introducing Calgara, the Shandia, and the first hints of Noland’s legend.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: to light the flame of shandora!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Your distant ancestor... The great warrior Calgara...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Why he tried to recover our homelands.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Listen carefully. The great warrior Calgara had...

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: A person he considered a true friend.

summary: The chapter turns into the old history of Shandora, introducing Calgara, the Shandia, and the first hints of Noland’s legend.
